name: Algaza-ha: Quest Giver
short_description: Algaza-Ha: Quest Giver blends strategy, narrative, and guild management into a unique character-driven experience. Build your guild, guide your heroes, and shape their stories—one quest at a time.
detailed_description:
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

ALGAZA-HA: QUEST GIVER - STEAM DESCRIPTION (ENGLISH VERSION)

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Algaza-Ha: Quest Giver is a strategy and narrative game where you take on the role of Guild Master: organizing missions, choosing which heroes to send, and dealing with the consequences of each decision.

You don't control battles — you decide who will face each challenge. Every mission brings unique dialogues, interactions between heroes, and stories that evolve according to your choices through epic narrative arcs.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

🎮 CORE MECHANICS

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

🛡️ GUILD MANAGEMENT

• 15 unique heroines with distinct personalities and abilities

• Each heroine has 3 specialized abilities across 13 different types

• Track growth through 20 levels of progression

• Availability system: heroines on missions cannot be sent simultaneously

📜 EXPANDED MISSION SYSTEM

• Over 90 unique missions distributed across narrative arcs

• 13 ability types: Fight, Diplomacy, Stealth, Athletics, Arcana, Cure, Alchemy, Nature, Performance, Survival, Religion, Intimidation, Investigation, Engineering, Thievery

• Solo and team missions (up to 2 heroines for complex challenges)

• Dependency system: some missions only appear after completing others

• Exclusive missions: choices can permanently close alternative paths

• Varied outcomes: Success, Failure, Critical, and Critical Failure with real impacts

🎭 DYNAMIC AND CONTEXTUAL DIALOGUES

• Each mission generates unique conversations based on the heroines sent

• Different dialogues for each outcome (success, failure, critical)

• Special interactions between character pairs

• Expressions, comments, inside jokes, and conflicts between heroines

• Relationship system: heroines comment on present and absent allies

• Each character speaks with their unique voice in all situations

⚔️ PROGRESSION SYSTEM AND NARRATIVE ARCS

• Multiple intertwined narrative arcs that unfold throughout the game

• Turn-based system: advance time while heroines explore the world

• Earn XP in missions, level up, and unlock new capabilities

• Organized guild panel: available, active, and completed missions

• Permanent consequences: your decisions affect how the story unfolds

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

✨ GAME HIGHLIGHTS

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

⭐ STARTING ROSTER (8 HEROINES AVAILABLE AT START)

• Lyra Fangsword (Warrior)

Specialties: Intimidation, Athletics, Survival

• Aureth Valmor (Paladin)

Specialties: Religion, Diplomacy, Intimidation

• Maelis Thornwake (Druid)

Specialties: Survival, Nature, Athletics

• Saryth Moonsong (Shaman)

Specialties: Cure, Nature, Performance

• Nyssa Duskstring (Bard)

Specialties: Thievery, Diplomacy, Performance

• Kaela Dawnlight (Cleric)

Specialties: Religion, Cure, Investigation

• Leona Valmor (Mage)

Specialties: Arcana, Investigation, Alchemy

• Serah Korr (Monk)

Specialties: Athletics, Religion, Intimidation

⭐ UNLOCKABLE HEROINES (7 ADDITIONAL CHARACTERS)

• Seraphine Quillwick (Alchemist)

Specialties: Alchemy, Investigation, Cure

• Elara Truestep (Rogue)

Specialties: Thievery, Stealth, Investigation

• Nyx Varrow (Assassin)

Specialties: Thievery, Stealth, Intimidation

• Morga Sixfold (Barbarian)

Specialties: Intimidation, Athletics, Survival

• Mina Gravebloom (Necromancer)

Specialties: Arcana, Diplomacy, Religion

• Raska Ironcoil (Tinker)

Specialties: Investigation, Engineering, Thievery

• Gaela Stoneecho (Geomancer)

Specialties: Survival, Arcana, Nature

Each heroine has a unique personality, complex background, specific relationships with other characters, and personal development arcs.

⭐ MISSION VARIETY

Diplomatic Missions:

• Resolve border disputes and conflicts between villages

• Mediate arranged marriages and disputed inheritances

• Navigate political successions and cultural tensions

Combat and Action Missions:

• Rescue hostages in imminent danger situations

• Stop magical threats and uncontrolled creatures

• Contain natural disasters and structural collapses

Infiltration Missions:

• Invade fortresses to test defenses

• Recover stolen artifacts without being detected

• Spy on suspicious organizations and collect evidence

Investigation Missions:

• Unravel dangerous cults and conspiracies

• Investigate supernatural phenomena

• Uncover the truth behind false accusations

Survival Missions:

• Guide lost caravans through deadly deserts

• Rescue groups isolated by storms and disasters

• Track kidnappers before it's too late

Specialized Missions:

• Cure epidemics and mysterious plagues

• Solve alchemical and magical disasters

• Perform critical performances at political events

• Disarm deadly traps in ancient dungeons

⭐ MISSION EXAMPLES

"The Forgotten Vault"

An influential noble lost his own vault combination. He swears the contents are "strictly personal" — but that always sounds suspicious.

Skills: Thievery, Arcana, Engineering

"Harmony at the Truce Banquet"

A fragile truce will be sealed at a banquet. The Guild must send a duo: an artist to entertain and distract, and a diplomat to mediate tense conversations.

Skills: Performance, Diplomacy (2 heroines)

"Silence Before Death"

An ancient dungeon is filled with lethal traps. The internal monsters are too powerful for confrontation. The task: map and disarm traps without being detected. One mistake means death.

Skills: Thievery

"Lost in the Whispering Dunes"

A caravan disappeared in the desert three days ago. Storms erased all tracks. Supplies must be running out. Find them before it's too late.

Skills: Survival

"The Ring That Was Never Sold"

A noble flaunts a ring that was illegally confiscated from the Guild. Recover it during a banquet without causing a scandal: one heroine distracts, another steals.

Skills: Thievery, Performance (2 heroines)

⭐ IMMERSIVE INTERFACE

• Presentation in ancient book style with ornamental details

• High-quality illustrated portraits for each heroine

• Text system with smooth typing animation

• Immersive ambient music and contextual sound effects

• Clear UI showing guild status, available heroines, and progress

• Informative tooltips for all mechanics

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

🌍 SUPPORTED LANGUAGES

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

• Portuguese (Brazil)

• English

• Spanish

• Simplified Chinese

• Japanese

• Russian

Full interface and subtitles in all languages.

All dialogues, mission descriptions, and texts fully translated.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

👤 WHO IS THIS GAME FOR?

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

✓ Ideal for players who enjoy:

• Light strategy with emphasis on narrative decisions

• Branching stories with permanent consequences

• Team and resource management

• Well-written dialogues and charismatic characters

• Satisfying progression through narrative arcs

• Discovering combinations and secret interactions

• Experiences that respect your time and intelligence

• Replaying to explore different paths

✗ NOT recommended for those seeking:

• Real-time or direct tactical combat

• Cutting-edge 3D graphics

• Frantic action requiring fast reflexes

• Completely linear stories without choices

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

📖 SYNOPSIS

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

As Guild Master of Algaza-Ha, it's your job to organize missions, train heroines, and rebuild your reputation — one contract at a time.

What begins as simple requests from local residents quickly evolves into increasingly dangerous threats. Grimoires gain consciousness. Dimensional portals open in the marketplace. Cults hide beneath popular festivals. Mysterious epidemics spread. And political decisions can change the fate of entire regions.

Heroines can fail, get hurt, argue with each other, evolve through challenges, or even question your leadership depending on your choices. Every mission tells a story. Every heroine has a personal journey. And every decision carries weight.

Are you prepared to lead the guild and make the decisions that will shape the kingdom?

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

🎯 KEY FEATURES

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

✦ 15 playable heroines with unique personalities and abilities

✦ 90+ varied missions across multiple narrative arcs

✦ Dynamic dialogue system with hundreds of variations

✦ 13 different ability types and challenges

✦ Progression through 20 levels per heroine

✦ Dependency and consequence system between missions

✦ Solo and duo missions for different strategies

✦ Relationships and special interactions between characters

✦ Choices that permanently open or close paths

✦ Medieval book-style interface with hand-drawn art

✦ Full support for 6 languages

✦ Immersive soundtrack and contextual effects

✦ Progressive character unlock system

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

⚙️ SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

MINIMUM:

• OS: Windows 7/8/10/11 (64-bit)

• Processor: Dual Core 2 GHz

• Graphics: Intel HD Graphics 4000

• Memory: 2 GB RAM

• Storage: 500 MB available space

• DirectX: Version 11

RECOMMENDED:

• OS: Windows 10/11 (64-bit)

• Processor: Dual Core 3 GHz or higher

• Graphics: Dedicated GPU

• Memory: 4 GB RAM

• Storage: 1 GB available space

• DirectX: Version 11

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

🎁 LAUNCH CONTENT

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

INITIAL RELEASE:

• 8 heroines immediately playable

• 90+ unique and varied missions

• Multiple intertwined narrative arcs

• Hundreds of contextual dialogues and interactions

• Complete progression and unlock system

• All translations implemented

PLANNED FUTURE UPDATES:

• New heroines and classes

• Mission and narrative arc expansions

• More interactions and relationships between characters

• New gameplay systems

• Alternative modes

• And much more based on community feedback!

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Join the Guild of Algaza-Ha and discover if you have what it takes to lead heroines through the greatest challenges the kingdom has ever faced!

supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian

reviews.review_text: a nice foundation, likeable characters, waiting for the next chapters.
Still on early stages but it is simple fun, has a catchy song and funny dialogues.
